raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad dsirdeja tee Laudis/ 
kas tur bij apmettuschees / fak- 
fam : Simrus irr weenu Derri- 
bu darrijs/ un arridsan to Kehni- 
nu nokawis/ tad darrija wiſe 
Israëls Amru to Katzza Leel-Kun- 
gu tai Deena par Kehnizu pahr 
Israëlu paſcha Lehgeri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Amrus zehlehs/un wiſe 
Israëls ar winnu no Gibetona/ 
un apmettehs prett Tirzu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu Simrus redſeja/ 
ka Pilſſahts bija usneints/ tad 
gahje wiſch uſ ta Kehnixa 
Namina Pilli / un fadedsinaja 
ta Kehnixa Namunu lihds ar fe- 
win ar Ugguni/ un nomirre.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Sawu Grehku deht / ar 
ko wiſch bij apgrehkojees faunu 
darridains preekſch ta KUNGA 
Azzim/ statgadains uſ Jerobea- 
ma Zehtu/ un eekſch winna Greh- 
keem/ ko wiſch darrija / darri- 
Dains Israëlu grehfoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kas weht no Simrus 
Leetahm atleek/ un winna Derri- 
ba/ ko wiſch darrijs/ tas irr rak- 
stihts to Israëta Kehnizu Laiku- 
Grahmata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad dallijahs tee Israëta 
Landis dtwejös Pulkös / weena 
Lauschu Puſſe peekehrabs Tib- 
nam Ginata Dehlam/ ka tee win- 
nu par Kehnizu darritu/ un oh- 
tra Puſſe peekehrabs Amrum.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee Laudis/ kas Am- 
rum peekehrabs bija stipraki/ ne- 
ka tee Laudis/ kas Tibnam Gi-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Trihsdefnuts pirma Ga- 
dā Afus ta Kehniza no Juha- 
tappe Amrus par Kehnizu pa- 
Israëlu/ un waldija diwipad- 
mits Gaddus / Tirzā wald- 
wiſch feſchus Gaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſch pirke to Kal- 
Samartju no Semexa par di- 
Talenteim Sudraba/ un tai- 
(Pilsfahtu) uſ to/ un nofar- 
ta Pilsfahta Wahrdn/ ko win- 
bij ustaitijs pehz Semexa / 
Kunga ta Kalnu Wahrdn / E- 
mariju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Amrus darrija/ 
tam KUNGAM ne patikke / 
wiſch darrija wairak Launun- 
ne ka wiſſi / kas preekſch win- 
bijuscht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſch statgaja 
wifteem Zetteem Jerobeaina N- 
bata Dehla / un eekſch win- 
Grehkeem/ ar ko wiſch Isra- 
bij darrijs grehfoht / aptaiti- 
dains to KUNGU Israëta D- 
wu ar sawahm Negantibahm
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas weht no Amr- 
atleek/ ko wiſch irr darrijs/ 
winna Warra/ ko wiſch irr 
rahdijs/ tas irr rakstihts to Is- 
etā Kehnizu Laiku-Grahmata
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Amrus aisminigge 
fawem Tehweem/ un tappe S- 
marija aprakts/ un winna Det- 
Akabs tappe par Kehnizu wi- 
na Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Akabs Amrus Det- 
tap
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
